title: Farming and space.
description: Settle on your homeworld with new terrain, Mobs, tech and functions or go into space, its up to you.
body:
You looking for something new? try this modpack out idk man.
This is a modpack for everybody. Tech? Farming? Space? Exploration? I HAVE IT ALL MY SIGMAS

Some of the mods:

World gen: Nullscape, Terralith, YUNG's collection of structure mods, Dungeons and taverns and more.

Performance: Never lag again with mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Ferritcore, ImmediatlyFast and many more.

Immersion: First Person Model, Sounds, AmbientSounds, Falling leaves and once again theres more.

Farming and tech mods such as Create, Ad Astra, Farmers delight.

QoL mods like Ore and Tree Harvester, Replanting crops mod, Villagers in a bucket, And more.
